description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test, and deploy. Include a global before_script that echoes "Before script section", "For example you might run an update here or install a build dependency", and "Or perhaps you might print out some debugging details", and a global after_script that echoes "After script section" and "For example you might do some cleanup here". Add a build1 job in the build stage that runs echo "Do your build here", pwd, whoami, and ip addr. Add two test jobs (test1 and test2) in the test stage that each echo their respective messages ("Do a test here" / "For example run a test suite" and "Do another parallel test here" / "For example run a lint test"). Add a deploy1 job in the deploy stage that runs echo "Do your deploy here". No specific Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined.
